author: y4rr
content: Plan: Phase F closure. Compose B.3a (VAE decoder), B.3b (UNet), B.3c (CLIP) + new DDIM scheduler into StableDiffusionPipeline. Pin reference via diffusers, dump per-step fixtures to HF, write rust pipeline that reads init_latent from mirror (rust PRNG != torch PRNG), verify each stage (text_embeds, latents, noise predictions, final image) meets per-stage tolerance.
